event: aortic root replacement with a homograft
presented with 2 weeks of worsening right-sided chest pain
growing pulsatile mass on the right sternal border
location 1.4 cm superior to right coronary artery ostium
distance from right coronary ostium to innominate artery 60.5 mm
consent for endovascular stent graft placement
transvenous pacer advanced into right ventricle
left axillary artery accessed via infraclavicular incision
wire exchanged for double-curved Lunderquist wire
pigtail catheter advanced to aortic valve
stent graft angled along lesser curve of aorta
completion angiography demonstrated patency of coronary arteries
admission blood cultures grew Pseudomonas aeruginosa
lifelong suppressive therapy with oral levofloxacin
stable positioning of stent grafts at 6 months
